meta.description: Use when building a binary classification model from an expression matrix or other omics feature matrix with LASSO logistic regression, cross-validation, and coefficient path visualization. NOT for: multiclass classification, survival/Cox models, or ordinary linear regression.

scientific_integrity.detail: No fabricated statistics; all outputs computed from actual input data

practice_boundaries.detail: NOT for section in frontmatter description prevents misuse for multiclass, survival, and linear regression

methodological_ground.detail: LASSO binomial glmnet with alpha=1 correctly documented; lambda.min extraction is methodologically correct; no principled fallacies

code_usability.detail: Dependency check fires cleanly with structured error; 8-file modular structure verified; each file under 150 lines; no syntax errors detected

functional_suitability.note: Binary classification, LASSO (alpha=1), cv.glmnet, coefficient path and CV plots covered; no alpha control (fixed at 1) limits scope compared to elastic-net-feature-selection

reliability.note: 15 SKILL_* codes — most comprehensive error coverage in the batch; includes SKILL_PARSE_ERROR, SKILL_FILE_WRITE_ERROR, SKILL_MEMORY_ERROR beyond standard set

performance_context.note: SKILL.md 275 lines; When to Read External Files table at top; modular scripts under 150 lines each; timeout control

agent_usability.note: Usage section clear; workflow steps labeled; When to Read at top; minor gaps: no agent response contract, no dedicated stop conditions section in body

human_usability.note: Natural trigger language; 15 error codes handle all edge cases; strict validation correct per Category 3 Override 2

security.note: requireNamespace() dependency checks; no eval/exec/system; temp file cleanup in implementation checklist; session_info for reproducibility

maintainability.note: 8-file modular structure with explicit less-than-150-lines-per-file constraint; clean separation of plotting, modeling, io; no post-run file checklist

agent_specific.note: Precise trigger with NOT for in frontmatter; When to Read External Files at top; clean CSV/PDF outputs; idempotent reruns; minor gap: stop conditions not in SKILL.md body

key_strengths: 15 SKILL_* error codes — the most comprehensive error coverage in the batch, including SKILL_PARSE_ERROR, SKILL_FILE_WRITE_ERROR, and SKILL_MEMORY_ERROR
Strict less-than-150-lines-per-file modularity constraint with explicit statement in implementation checklist
When to Read External Files table at the very top of SKILL.md enables rapid progressive disclosure for agents
Natural trigger language with NOT for in frontmatter description prevents misuse for multiclass, survival, and linear regression

recommendations.title: Fixed alpha=1 limits reusability vs elastic-net-feature-selection
recommendations.problem: The skill is fixed to LASSO (alpha=1) with no alpha control. Users who want elastic net or ridge should use elastic-net-feature-selection, but this overlap is not called out, potentially causing users to use the wrong skill.
recommendations.root_cause: The skill was designed specifically for LASSO; alpha=1 is hardcoded in modeling.R with no alpha parameter exposed.
recommendations.fix: Add a When Not to Use entry: 'When you need alpha < 1 (elastic net or ridge regularization), use the elastic-net-feature-selection skill instead.' This prevents skill selection errors.

recommendations.title: No agent response contract after successful run
recommendations.problem: After a successful run, the skill does not specify what the agent should report, leaving summarization inconsistent.
recommendations.root_cause: Agent Response Contract section is absent from SKILL.md.
recommendations.fix: Add an Agent Response Contract section specifying: number of selected features from selected_features.txt, lambda.min value, top coefficients from coefficient.csv, and artifact paths for all 7 output files.

recommendations.title: No dedicated stop conditions section in SKILL.md body
recommendations.problem: The NOT for conditions appear only in the frontmatter description, not in the SKILL.md body where an agent executing the skill would encounter them during workflow steps.
recommendations.root_cause: Out-of-scope guidance is only in the frontmatter description; no When Not To Use or Stop Conditions section in the body.
recommendations.fix: Add a Stop Conditions section in the SKILL.md body mirroring the NOT for conditions from the frontmatter: multiclass, survival/Cox, ordinary linear regression.
